hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in */node_modules/*|*/.git/*|*/dist/*|*/build/*|*/.next/*|*/target/*|*/vendor/*|*.lock|*package-lock.json|*yarn.lock|*pnpm-lock.yaml|*go.sum|*.log) exit 0 ;; esac; case "$f" in *docs/*|*.md|*.mdx) msg="You edited docs. Check other docs/specs that cross-reference this for drift; if implementation elsewhere reflects the old version, flag it." ;; *) msg="You edited code. If this changes behavior documented in docs/, specs/, README, or similar, update the corresponding doc in the same turn (Karpathy: docs are first-class). If no docs apply, ignore this." ;; esac; jq -n --arg m "$msg" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$m}}'; }
